zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Erskine於1310年4月1日出生在蘇格蘭雷福福爾厄斯金時，他的父親Sir William Erskine of that Ilk36歲，母親Alice Stewart42歲。他和Christian Menteih Of Arran至少有3個女兒。他埋葬在英國蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Erskine于1310年4月1日出生在苏格兰雷福福爾厄斯金时，他的父亲Sir William Erskine of that Ilk36岁，母亲Alice Stewart42岁。他和Christian Menteih Of Arran至少有3个女儿。他埋葬在英国苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Erskine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the barony of Erskine in Renfrewshire, first recorded in 1226 in the form Erskyn.
History: A family of this name have held a number of Scottish titles, including the earldoms of Mar, Buchan, Kellie, and Rosslyn.

variants.name: Erskin
meanings: Scottish (central Scotland and Fife): variant of   Erskine  . This form of the surname is now more common in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Erskine was born on 1 April 1310, in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, his father, Sir William Erskine of that Ilk, was 36 and his mother, Alice Stewart, was 42. He had at least 3 daughters with Christian Menteih Of Arran. He was buried in Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Erskine est né le 1 avril 1310, à Erskine, Renfrewshire, Écosse, son père, Sir William Erskine of that Ilk, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Alice Stewart, avait 42 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 filles avec Christian Menteih Of Arran. Ilenterré à Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Erskine am 1. April 1310 in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Erskine of that Ilk 36 und seine Mutter Alice Stewart 42. Er hatte mit Christian Menteih Of Arran mindestens 3 Töchter. Er wurde in Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Erskine è nato il il 1 aprile 1310 nel Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir William Erskine of that Ilk, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Alice Stewart, aveva 42 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figlie con Christian Menteih Of Arran. Fu sepolto a Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Erskineが1310年4月1日にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアエルスキンで生まれた時，父Sir William Erskine of that Ilkは36歳，母Alice Stewartは42歳であった。彼はChristian Menteih Of Arranとの間に少なくとも3人の娘をもうけた。彼はイギリススコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Erskine(이)가 1310년 4월 1일 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 어스킨에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Erskine of that Ilk(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Stewart(은)는 42세였다. 그는 Christian Menteih Of Arran(와)과 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 스코틀랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Erskine nasceu em 1 de abril de 1310, em Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir William Erskine of that Ilk, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Alice Stewart, tinha 42 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhas com Christian Menteih Of Arran. Ele foi sepultado em Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Erskine родился 1 апреля 1310 г. в местности эрскаин, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir William Erskine of that Ilk было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Stewart, 42. У него было по крайней мере 3 дочери от Christian Menteih Of Arran. Он был похоронен в местности Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Erskine nació el 1 de abril de 1310, en Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir William Erskine of that Ilk, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Alice Stewart, tenía 42 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijas con Christian Menteih Of Arran. Fue sepultado en Escocia, Reino Unido.
